titleStmt.title: SII 24.83: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 83. (A.R. No. 124 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase, by Kiḷiyūruḍaiyār Nāḍaṟipugaḻaṉ alias Kāliṅgarāyar for a flower garden. Since this piece of land was found insufficient, another piece of land purchased by him in the 33rd year was also added to this. The adhikāri at the time was Nishadharāja. The record is dated in the [3]8th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari puviyi tannemiyaḷavun=tan kkiramattoḻilāl putu karattu vāri Ayil muṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai tivaṭa
ticai vākai cū potumaiyum � maiyiṟ cūṭit tan peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ve
ṇṇilāt tikaḻa kaṭaṟṟivān=tarattu pū parun=talaittiṭat ta ḻai yentuñ colletir maṇalūr
naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavu meṅkaṇumpaṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan tānu n=tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap pala pala mutukum payantetir māṟi paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pu
kaḻin celvi maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkariniraiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamentum pāṇiyiraṇṭu Oruvicaik kaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷa varu parittalaṅkaḷu porukarittalaṅkaḷun tan=tiravāriyumuṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal ttan peruñ ceṉai
yevip pañcava porkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭa Araṇena kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟikkoṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin Īlāpamum muttamiṭpotiyilu maṟṟaveṅkaripaṭumayyaccaiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷi tennāṭṭellaikkāṭṭi ṟellām
māveṟiya tan varutaṉit talaivarai kuṟukalar koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟaikoḷ siṅhāsanattiruntaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum viramum tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripanmarāṉa cakkaravartti śrīkolottuṅka coḷa tevaṟku yāṇṭu
38Āvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu ḻvān koyilil śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyam kāñcikkuṟi vaṭa kopuramuṭaiyānum Iṭavai tiruvaraṅkamāḷiyum nālūr tirunāṭuṭaiyānum kantāṭai tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum periyatirunanta vānattu cuntarat toḷuṭaiyānum coḻamātevit tiruvattiyūrāṇiyum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan kuṟukai rāvamutum Ā
ṭaiyān cirākavanum varaṅkanārāyaṇa � pāratāyen variyānum Ā ṅkecuyan yiḷañciṅkamum pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirā m sabhaik kaṇakku Araiyan Ampala tanāna nānūṟṟuvappiriyanum śrīvayiṣṇa vakkaṇakku veṅkaṭavan comanāta patineṭṭu nāṭu kiḻavanumāka Atikārikaḷ niṣata rājā Evalppaṭi Ivvaṉaivom pāṇṭi kulāca
nivaḷanāṭṭu kiḷiyūr nāṭṭu kiḷiyūr kiḷiyūruṭaiyār nāṭaṟi pukaḻaṉāna kaliṅkarāyaṟku nāṅkaḷa(ḷa)ṭuttukkuṭutta nilamāvatu . keraḷāntaka vaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu kaḷakkuṭi nāṭaṟi pukaḻan viḷākattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai Eḻupatteṭṭu nāṭantirunantavānam maranilaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ātināta viḷākattu maṇṇilaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kaṟkuṭi paḻanilattuva
rampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eḻupatteṭṭu nāṭaṟi tirunantavaṉattu vaṭavelikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunān kellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilam mukkāl Innilam mukkālum Ivvāṇṭu mutal Inta nilam mukkālum Ittirunantavāṉam ceyvārkkup porāmaiyil yāṇṭu muppattu muṉṟāvatu śrī paṇṭāratte Araikkāl kācoṭukki Innilattoṭu maṭaiyakkoṇṭa nila
kācu mukkālum Āḻvār śrī paṇṭāratte yoṭukki Ivvāṇṭu mutal Etir Iraṇṭāṭṭai nāḷil tiruttu tākavum Itukku puṉce varicai ve Āka nilam mukkālu Araikkāl Āka nilam mukkāle Araikkāl Inta mukkāle Araikkālum Innilam mukkāle Araikkālum koṇṭu Ittirunantavāṉam cantrā(t)tittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavo
ntavāṉattukku paṇi ceykiṟa Ālaṅkuṭit tiruvālinampi Uḷḷiṭṭār muvarkku perāl nel kuṟuṇiyāka nāḷoṉṟukku nel mukkuṟuṇiyum muṉṟukkum Uḷom . Itu śrīvaiyṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
